name: Peñalta de Benatae - circular por el P. N. de las Sierras de Cazorla, Segura y las Villas
region_intro: Mountain bike trails around Benatae are set within the mountainous Sierra de Segura, a region characterized by its varied topography and extensive forests. The area is largely encompassed by the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park, offering diverse landscapes for mountain biking. Riders can expect challenging ascents and descents, with routes passing through forests and fields of olive trees. This environment provides a range of technical sections and elevation changes suitable for experienced mountain bikers. Best mountain bike trails around Benatae The most popular mountain bike trail is The Cerro de los Calarejos from Siles - circular route through the Natural Park of the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura and las Villas, a 31.2 miles (50.2 km) trail that takes 5 hours 34 minutes to complete. This difficult route features significant elevation gain within the natural park. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Segura de la Sierra from Siles - circular via the Morles river, a difficult 30.9 miles (49.7 km) path. This route offers challenging terrain through the Sierra de Segura, following the Morles river. Local mountain bikers also love the Segura de la Sierra and Orcera MTB Loop, a 14.0 miles (22.5 km) trail leading through diverse landscapes of the Sierra de Segura, often completed in about 2 hours 9 minutes. Mountain biking around Benatae is defined by mountainous terrain, extensive forests, and the varied landscapes of the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park. The network offers options for different ability levels, including 1 easy, 16 moderate, and 15 difficult mountain bike trails. The routes in Benatae are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.7 stars from more than 10 reviews. More than 200 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Benatae's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of mountain biking terrain can I expect around Benatae?
A: Mountain biking around Benatae is characterized by its mountainous terrain within the Sierra de Segura, beneath the prominent peak of Peñalta. The region is largely part of the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park, offering diverse landscapes including extensive forests, fields of olive trees, and varied topography with challenging ascents and descents. You'll find an 'orographic labyrinth' of valleys, limestone quarries, and high plateaus.

Q: How many mountain bike trails are available in the Benatae area?
A: There are over 30 mountain bike trails around Benatae. The network offers a range of options, including 1 easy, 16 moderate, and 15 difficult routes, catering to various skill levels.

Q: Are there any family-friendly mountain bike trails in Benatae?
A: While many routes in Benatae are categorized as moderate to difficult, there is 1 easy mountain bike trail available. For families looking for a less strenuous ride, it's advisable to check the difficulty ratings and elevation profiles of routes on komoot to find the most suitable option.

Q: What are some notable natural features or landmarks I might see while mountain biking near Benatae?
A: The trails around Benatae offer stunning views and pass through significant natural features. You can explore the vast Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park, with its European Black Pine and Aleppo Pine forests. Notable peaks include &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2556115" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñalta de Benatae (1,412 m)&lt;/a&gt;, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5182824" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico Mentiras&lt;/a&gt;, and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5298253" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Yelmo Summit (1,808 m)&lt;/a&gt;. The area is also known for its numerous springs, such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5391926" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Toba Spring&lt;/a&gt;, which can provide picturesque spots for breaks.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes around Benatae?
A: Yes, many of the mountain bike routes around Benatae are circular. For example, the challenging route &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1211840924/the-cerro-de-los-calarejos-from-siles-circular-route-through-the-natural-park-of-the-sierra-de-cazorla-segura-and-las-villas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;The Cerro de los Calarejos from Siles&lt;/a&gt; is a circular route through the Natural Park. Another option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1211875475/segura-de-la-sierra-from-siles-circular-via-the-morles-river" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Segura de la Sierra from Siles - circular via the Morles river&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What is the difficulty level of mountain biking trails in Benatae?
A: Mountain biking trails in Benatae are generally considered challenging. The majority of routes are rated as moderate (16 trails) or difficult (15 trails), with only 1 easy trail available. Riders should expect significant elevation changes and technical sections, making it suitable for experienced mountain bikers.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy most about the trails in Benatae?
A: The mountain bike trails around Benatae are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.7 stars from over 10 reviews. More than 200 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore the area, often praising the varied terrain, extensive forests, and the stunning natural beauty of the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park.

Q: Are there any specific routes that offer panoramic views?
A: Many routes in the Benatae area, especially those ascending peaks like Peñalta, offer impressive panoramic views of the surrounding Sierra de Segura and the vast Natural Park. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e993781462/penalta-de-benatae-circular-por-el-p-n-de-las-sierras-de-cazorla-segura-y-las-villas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñalta de Benatae circular route&lt;/a&gt; is known for its scenic vistas.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Benatae?
A: Given Benatae's location within a mountainous region of Spain, spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant conditions for mountain biking, with milder temperatures. Summers can be hot, and winters may bring colder weather to the higher elevations of the Sierra de Segura.

Q: Is there parking available near the mountain bike trails in Benatae?
A: While specific parking areas for each trail are not detailed, Benatae is a village within a natural park. It is generally advisable to look for parking in or near the village centers or designated visitor areas within the Sierra de Cazorla, Segura y Las Villas Natural Park, which often provide access points to trails.

Q: Are there any mountain bike routes that pass through different villages or towns?
A: Yes, some routes connect different settlements. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e993776436/segura-de-la-sierra-and-orcera-mtb-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Segura de la Sierra and Orcera MTB Loop&lt;/a&gt; leads through diverse landscapes and connects these two towns, offering a chance to experience more of the local area.

Summit located in the municipality of Benatae in the region of La Sierra de Segura.

The Peñalta peak is 1,412 meters high and is located between the towns of Orcera and Benata.
